use_case_name: Transaction stopped while Charging Station is offline

structured.name: Transaction stopped while Charging Station is offline
structured.objective: To enable the EV Driver to stop a transaction while the Charging Station is Offline.
structured.description:
This use case describes how an EV Driver can stop a transaction while the Charging Station is
Offline. While a transaction is ongoing and the Charging Station is Offline, the EV Driver presents
his IdToken, if the Charging Stations knows locally (without asking the CSMS) that this IdToken is
allowed to stop the transaction, it will stop the ongoing transaction.
When the Charging Station restores the connection with the CSMS, it needs to send the
information about this Offline stop transaction to the CSMS.
scenario: 1. The EV Driver presents IdToken to stop the transaction.

2. When this is the same IdToken as was used to start the transaction, or via the Local
Authorization List and / or Authorization Cache the GroupId can be validated: the transaction is
stopped.
3. The Charging Station stops the energy offer.
4. The TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) is stored/queued by the Charging Station.
5. The connection between Charging Station and CSMS is restored.
6. The Charging Station starts to send queued messages

7. The stored TransactionEventRequest is sent, notifying the CSMS about the transaction that
was stopped.
structured.postconditions: Charging Station is in Idle status.
structured.remarks:
groupId check must be done on Local Authorization List and / or Authorization Cache if available.
The scenario description and sequence diagram above are based on the Configuration Variable
for stop transaction being configured as follows.
TxStopPoint: ParkingBayOccupancy, EVConnected, Authorized
This use-case is also valid for other configurations, but then the transaction might stop at another
moment, which might change the sequence in which message are sent. For more details see the
use case: E06 - Stop Transaction options

The Charging Station SHALL stop the energy
offering.

If the IdToken presented has the same

the transaction.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL stop the energy
offering.

requirements.precondition:
(E08.FR.01 OR E08.FR.02)
AND
Cable not permanently attached
requirements.definition: The Charging Station SHALL unlock the connector.

The Charging Station SHALL "generate" a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended).

The Charging Station MUST queue any
TransactionEventRequest messages.

The Charging Station MUST send queued
TransactionEventRequest messages.

The flag: offline SHALL be set to TRUE for any
TransactionEventRequest that occurred while the
Charging Station was offline.

requirements.precondition:
When a TransactionEventRequest has
to be created
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL set the message’s
seqNo field as specified in Sequence Number
Generation.

requirements.precondition:
When configured to send meter data
in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Ended), See: Meter
Values - Configuration
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured
measurands to the optional meterValue field in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) sent
to the CSMS to provide more details about
transaction usage.

requirements.precondition:
E08.FR.09
AND
The Charging Station is running low on
memory
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended)
message.

When dropping meter data, the Charging Station
SHALL drop intermediate values first (2nd value,
4th value, 6th etc), not drop the start and end values
from the list.

The Charging Station SHALL retrieve signed meter
values and put them in the signedMeterValue field
of sampledValues.

chunks.content:
# E08 - Transaction stopped while Charging Station is offline

**Objective:** To enable the EV Driver to stop a transaction while the Charging Station is Offline.

**Description:** This use case describes how an EV Driver can stop a transaction while the Charging Station is
Offline. While a transaction is ongoing and the Charging Station is Offline, the EV Driver presents
his IdToken, if the Charging Stations knows locally (without asking the CSMS) that this IdToken is
allowed to stop the transaction, it will stop the ongoing transaction.
When the Charging Station restores the connection with the CSMS, it needs to send the
information about this Offline stop transaction to the CSMS.

**Actors:** Charging Station, CSMS, EV Driver

**Scenario:**
1. The EV Driver presents IdToken to stop the transaction.
2. When this is the same IdToken as was used to start the transaction, or via the Local
Authorization List and / or Authorization Cache the GroupId can be validated: the transaction is
stopped.
3. The Charging Station stops the energy offer.
4. The TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended) is stored/queued by the Charging Station.
5. The connection between Charging Station and CSMS is restored.
6. The Charging Station starts to send queued messages
7. The stored TransactionEventRequest is sent, notifying the CSMS about the transaction that
was stopped.

**Prerequisites:** Transaction ongoing and connection lost.

**Postconditions:** Charging Station is in Idle status.

**Remarks:** groupId check must be done on Local Authorization List and / or Authorization Cache if available.
The scenario description and sequence diagram above are based on the Configuration Variable
for stop transaction being configured as follows.
TxStopPoint: ParkingBayOccupancy, EVConnected, Authorized
This use-case is also valid for other configurations, but then the transaction might stop at another
moment, which might change the sequence in which message are sent. For more details see the
use case: E06 - Stop Transaction options

metadata.heading: E08 - Transaction stopped while Charging Station is offline
metadata.use_case_name: Transaction stopped while Charging Station is offline

chunks.content:
# E08 - Requirements

**E08.FR.01**
Precondition: If the IdToken presented is the same
as the IdToken used to start the
transaction.
The Charging Station SHALL stop the energy
offering.

**E08.FR.02**
Precondition: If the IdToken presented has the same
GroupId as the IdToken used to start
the transaction.
The Charging Station SHALL stop the energy
offering.

**E08.FR.03**
Precondition: (E08.FR.01 OR E08.FR.02)
AND
Cable not permanently attached
The Charging Station SHALL unlock the connector.

**E08.FR.04**
Precondition: (E08.FR.01 OR E08.FR.02)
The Charging Station SHALL "generate" a
TransactionEventRequest (eventType = Ended).

**E08.FR.05**
Precondition: When Offline.
The Charging Station MUST queue any
TransactionEventRequest messages.

**E08.FR.06**
Precondition: After the connection is restored.
The Charging Station MUST send queued
TransactionEventRequest messages.

**E08.FR.07**
The flag: offline SHALL be set to TRUE for any
TransactionEventRequest that occurred while the
Charging Station was offline.

**E08.FR.08**
Precondition: When a TransactionEventRequest has
to be created
The Charging Station SHALL set the message’s
seqNo field as specified in Sequence Number
Generation.

**E08.FR.09**
Precondition: When configured to send meter data
in the TransactionEventRequest
(eventType = Ended), See: Meter
Values - Configuration
The Charging Station SHALL add the configured
measurands to the optional meterValue field in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended) sent
to the CSMS to provide more details about
transaction usage.

**E08.FR.10**
Precondition: E08.FR.09
AND
The Charging Station is running low on
memory
The Charging Station MAY drop meter data in the
TransactionEventRequest(eventType = Ended)
message.

**E08.FR.11**
Precondition: E08.FR.10
When dropping meter data, the Charging Station
SHALL drop intermediate values first (2nd value,
4th value, 6th etc), not drop the start and end values
from the list.

**E08.FR.12**
Precondition: SampledDataSignReadings is true
The Charging Station SHALL retrieve signed meter
values and put them in the signedMeterValue field
of sampledValues.

metadata.heading: E08 - Requirements
metadata.use_case_name: Transaction stopped while Charging Station is offline
